title: Juvan addon
description: The BEST PvP/Survival resource pack, stacked with QoL and appearance resources to improve your Minecraft experience!
body:
**The BEST PvP and survival resource pack**

This pack features:
> Custom textures such as:
- Wepons and tools
- Terrain changes like bushy leaves, golden savana, lower grass, ore borders...
- QoL texture changes etc.
> Small held items (from [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items))

> PvP enhancements:
- Custom enchantment glint
- Changes to PvP related textures
- 3D end crystals
- Different textures for breach and density maces
- Visible crossbow and bow charging animations etc.
> Custom particles:
- No explosion particles
- Smaller attack particles
- Transparent status effect particles etc.

> Custom font

> Custom sounds:
- Item break
- level up
- Menu click

**How to use:**
- Download this recource pack and drop it into your AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks folder
- Select this pack in the recource packs tab in the pause menu
- Enjoy the pack!
- **REQUIRES VARIENTS CIT FROM 1.21.2 TO 1.21.4:** https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit
- **REQUIRES CIT RESEWN FOR 1.21.1 OR LOWER:** https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

**While most of the textures were created by me I used some assets from these resource packs**
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
- Vanilla-Plus by xSpinHDx: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-plus-jaronwqhd
- Small Held Items by Bluebird: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items
- Mace textures by Ospree14: https://discord.gg/2kCwf8TNV4
- Some textures were also made by d0disturb: https://modrinth.com/user/disturb

**Join my discord if you want to support me :)**
https://discord.gg/MQfnkB3pNQ
